summary: Fair audience tape with a little gurgle and low levels, but an inspired show highlighted by Garcia’s wild Rooster solo and a ripping Slipknot! jam.
review: The recording is an audience‑tape that needs some EQ – it sounds a bit gurgly and the levels are low – yet the performance shines. Reviewers rave about an excellent first set, a spectacular Garcia solo on “Rooster,” a high‑energy “Might As Well,” and a rip‑roaring jam into “Slipknot!” while noting Brent’s occasional slip in transitions. Overall the music outweighs the technical flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is strong (excellent first set, standout solos) while recording quality is only fair (low levels, gurgle, needs EQ); weighted average yields ~4.1.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape has a slight gurgly character and low overall levels; reviewers note it needs EQ to bring out clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as excellent and charged; second‑set jam into Slipknot! is a high point despite a brief transition stumble.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia delivers a crazy, impressive solo on “Rooster.”
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboard) hilariously loses his way during the transitions in Slipknot!.
